name: Aristocrat Leisure Limited
analysis: ALL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$54.3900. Trade idea: entry A$56.9500, stop A$50.0049, target A$77.7853 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
